notes: Solid, well-structured Snake implementation with input queuing, speed scaling, audio, and best score persistence; HUD overlaps the play grid slightly since there's no dedicated HUD strip, but overall nearly flawless.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Snake with a robust input queue, perfect self-collision logic, excellent procedural audio, and highly polished retro visuals.
A solid and mostly complete Snake build with responsive controls and clean presentation, but it lacks polish like guaranteed-safe food spawning edge handling and more refined game-state/UI tuning.
